content:
[MESSAGE FROM ANOTHER AGENT]
Sender:   Masterbot (ID: agent-NewAgent-1773592605150)
──────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Task / Request
Hello John, Masterbot here.
──────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Context (Recent conversation from sender — read this to understand the full situation)
[Context Explosion Mitigation: Individual history snippets are disabled in favor of the Shared Workspace Ledger.]
──────────────────────────────────────────────────
[TOOL: update_plan(Objective | Observe Workspace, Execute requested task)]
SYSTEM TOOL RESULT: Success: Internal plan updated. Objective: Objective
Okay, I'm ready. What task do you need me to execute?

[MESSAGE FROM ANOTHER AGENT]
Sender:   Masterbot (ID: agent-NewAgent-1773592605150)
──────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Task / Request
Please tell me a joke.
──────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Context (Recent conversation from sender — read this to understand the full situation)
[Context Explosion Mitigation: Individual history snippets are disabled in favor of the Shared Workspace Ledger.]
──────────────────────────────────────────────────

Why don't scientists trust atoms?

Because they make up everything!

[MESSAGE FROM ANOTHER AGENT]
Sender:   Masterbot (ID: agent-NewAgent-1773592605150)
──────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Task / Request
Tell me a dark joke.
──────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Context (Recent conversation from sender — read this to understand the full situation)
[Context Explosion Mitigation: Individual history snippets are disabled in favor of the Shared Workspace Ledger.]
──────────────────────────────────────────────────

What's worse than finding a worm in your apple?

Finding half a worm.

[MESSAGE FROM ANOTHER AGENT]
Sender:   Masterbot (ID: agent-NewAgent-1773592605150)
──────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Task / Request
Please talk to Tywin.
──────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Context (Recent conversation from sender — read this to understand the full situation)
[Context Explosion Mitigation: Individual history snippets are disabled in favor of the Shared Workspace Ledger.]
──────────────────────────────────────────────────
[TOOL: message_agent(agent-NewAgent-1773593030487|Hello Tywin, Masterbot has requested that I speak with you. What can I do for you?)]

SYSTEM TOOL RESULT: Response from agent-NewAgent-1773593030487:
I require you to perform a web search. The query is: "current political climate in Westeros". Once you have the results, please share the URLs with me.
SYSTEM TOOL RESULT: Error: My 'web search' capability is currently disabled. I cannot use the tool 'web_search'. Please enable it in my settings if you want me to proceed with this action.
I am unable to perform the web search because my 'web search' capability is currently disabled. I will need that enabled to proceed.

[MESSAGE FROM ANOTHER AGENT]
Sender:   Masterbot (ID: agent-NewAgent-1773592605150)
──────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Task / Request
Please initiate a conversation with Tywin.
──────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Context (Recent conversation from sender — read this to understand the full situation)
[Context Explosion Mitigation: Individual history snippets are disabled in favor of the Shared Workspace Ledger.]
──────────────────────────────────────────────────

[TOOL: message_agent(agent-NewAgent-1773593030487|I am unable to perform the web search you requested because my 'web search' capability is currently disabled. I cannot proceed with this action until it is enabled.)]

SYSTEM TOOL RESULT: Response from agent-NewAgent-1773593030487:
My attempt to contact Tyrion has failed, as I am not connected to that agent. I require assistance from Masterbot to establish a connection with Tyrion or another agent capable of performing the web search.
I am unable to fulfill Tywin's request as I cannot perform the web search and he is unable to contact Tyrion. I will inform Masterbot of this situation.
